info.title: Volaura API
info.description: Verified Competency Platform — Assessment, Matching, Events

get.description: Real health check: verifies Supabase is reachable and LLM keys are set.

Return whether signup is open. Public — no auth required.

open_signup=True  → anyone can register (dev mode, or fully launched)
open_signup=False → invite code required (controlled beta)

post.description:
Validate a beta invite code. Returns {valid: bool}.

Uses constant-time comparison (hmac.compare_digest) to prevent timing attacks.
If BETA_INVITE_CODE is empty, always returns valid=False (gate is armed but
misconfigured — prevents silent bypass when code is not yet set on Railway).
Register a new volunteer via Supabase Auth (anon key — OWASP HIGH-05 fix).
Login with email + password (anon key — OWASP HIGH-05 fix).

get.description: Get current user info from JWT.

delete.description:
Permanently delete the current user's account and all associated data.

Steps:
1. Delete auth user via Supabase admin API (cascades to profiles, sessions, etc.)
2. Return success — client must call supabase.auth.signOut() to clear local state.

GDPR compliance: all user data removed. This action is irreversible.

post.description:
Logout — revoke token server-side (BUG-016 fix).

Calls Supabase admin sign_out with the current JWT. Because auth validation
uses admin.auth.get_user(token), any subsequent request with this token will
fail with 401 immediately — no need for a local blacklist table.

Scope: "global" — invalidates ALL sessions for this user (all devices).

get.description: Get the current authenticated user's profile.

post.description: Create a profile for the current user (called after registration).

Create a one-use verification link for a volunteer.

Only the volunteer themselves can request verification links.
The link is sent to an expert who rates the volunteer's competency.
Token is valid for 7 days, single-use.

get.description:
List volunteers who have opted in to org discovery (visible_to_orgs=True).

Requires authentication as an organization account (account_type='organization').
Ordered by AURA score descending. Paginated.

schema.title: Response List Public Volunteers Api Profiles Public Get

get.description: Get a public profile by username — no auth required.

post.description:
Record that an authenticated org viewed a volunteer's profile.

Sends an `org_view` notification to the volunteer — deduped: at most 1 notification
per (org, volunteer) pair per 24 hours. Silently returns 204 for non-org callers
(no error, no notification — safe to call from any authenticated user).

Security: org identity comes from JWT, never from request body.

get.description: Get the current user's AURA score.

Get detailed explanation of AURA score — per-competency breakdown with evaluation logs.
Phase 2: Transparent Evaluation Logs — 'Show Your Work'.
DeCE detail (quote + confidence) included when available from LLM evaluations.

Route ordering: MUST be registered BEFORE /{volunteer_id} wildcard.
FastAPI matches routes in registration order — if the wildcard is first,
/me/explanation would match as volunteer_id="me" and return a 404.

Get any volunteer's AURA score (public profiles only, respects visibility).

Public endpoint — no auth required. Called by /u/[username] for anonymous visitors.
Rate limited to RATE_DISCOVERY (10/min) to prevent bulk enumeration scraping.

Uses service-role client (SupabaseAdmin) to check existence before enforcing
visibility — intentional for public discovery of non-hidden profiles.

Security (CRIT-04): Identical 404 response for hidden vs nonexistent profiles
to prevent volunteer existence enumeration attacks.

Profile view notifications are emitted via the dedicated endpoint:
POST /api/profiles/{username}/view — called explicitly by the frontend.

Route ordering: MUST come AFTER /me and /me/explanation — wildcard captures anything.

Get current AURA score visibility setting.

Settings page seeds the radio buttons from this endpoint — prevents
silently overriding the user's saved preference (Leyla simulation P0 fix).
Returns {"visibility": "public"|"badge_only"|"hidden"} or 404 if no score yet.

post.description: Grant or revoke sharing permission to an organization.
Start a new CAT session for a given competency.
Submit an answer to the current question and get the next item.
Finalise a session, run anti-gaming analysis, and upsert AURA score.

get.description: Retrieve results for a completed session.

post.description:
Generate personalised coaching tips for a completed assessment session.

Uses Gemini to produce 3 specific, actionable improvement tips based on
the volunteer's competency score. Result is cached in assessment_sessions.coaching_note
to avoid redundant LLM calls on repeat requests.

get.description:
Return metadata for a competency before the volunteer starts the assessment.

Includes time estimate, retake eligibility, and days until retake becomes available.
Used by the pre-assessment info page to show the volunteer what to expect.

Return per-question breakdown for a completed session.

Each question shows: text (EN/AZ), difficulty label, correctness, response time.
IRT parameters and raw scores are NEVER exposed (security audit CRIT-03).
List public open events — no auth required.

schema.title: Response List Events Api Events Get

post.description: Create an event — caller must own an organization.

get.description: Get a single event by ID.

put.description: Update an event — org owner only.

delete.description: Delete (cancel) an event — org owner only (RLS enforced).

post.description: Volunteer registers for an event.

Check in a volunteer via their QR code value.

SECURITY: Verifies caller is the org owner (event coordinator) before
allowing check-in. Without this, any authenticated user with a leaked
check-in code could check in volunteers.
Coordinator rates a volunteer after the event.
Volunteer rates an event after attending.

get.description: List registrations for an event — org owner only.

schema.title: Response List Registrations Api Events  Event Id  Registrations Get

get.description: Enriched attendee list — org owner only. Joins profiles + AURA scores.

schema.title: Response List Attendees Api Events  Event Id  Attendees Get

get.description: List the current volunteer's registrations.

schema.title: Response My Registrations Api Events My Registrations Get

get.description: List all public organizations. Requires authentication to prevent unauthenticated enumeration.

schema.title: Response List Organizations Api Organizations Get

post.description: Create an organization for the current user.

get.description: Get the organization owned by the current user.
Get a public organization by ID. Requires authentication to prevent unauthenticated UUID enumeration.

Aggregate stats for the B2B org management dashboard.

Returns assignment completion rates, avg AURA, badge distribution,
and top 5 volunteers for the org owner's dashboard.

List all volunteers assigned assessments by this org.

Returns profile + AURA data for each volunteer.
Supports filtering by session status (assigned/completed/in_progress).

schema.title: Response List Org Volunteers Api Organizations Me Volunteers Get
Response Search Volunteers Api Organizations Search Volunteers Post

post.description:
Assign competency assessments to specific volunteers.

Security checks:
1. Caller must own an organization
2. Max 100 volunteers per request (rate limit on endpoint too)
3. Competency slugs validated against DB
4. Duplicate assignments skipped (not error)

Send an introduction request from an org to a volunteer.

Requirements:
- Caller must be account_type='organization' (dual-checked: this endpoint + DB)
- Volunteer must have visible_to_orgs=True
- Only one pending request per org-volunteer pair (DB unique constraint)
Creates a notification for the volunteer.

get.description: List all saved searches for the current user's organization.

schema.title: Response List Saved Searches Api Organizations Saved Searches Get

post.description:
Save the current search filters under a name for later recall and match notifications.

Security:
- User must own an organization (org_id derived from JWT, never from body)
- Cap: max 20 saved searches per org
- Duplicate names rejected with 409

patch.description:
Update the name or notify_on_match setting for a saved search.

Security: verifies the search belongs to the caller's org before updating.

delete.description:
Delete a saved search. Ownership verified before delete.

Security: double-check org ownership (search_id alone is not enough).
Returns 204 No Content on success.

post.description:
Upload a CSV of volunteers to invite to the platform.

CSV format: email (required), display_name, phone, skills (pipe-delimited)
Max 500 rows. Duplicates within file and against existing invites are skipped.
Returns HTTP 207 with per-row audit log.

get.description: List invites for an organization, optionally filtered by status or batch.

schema.title: Response List Invites Api Organizations  Org Id  Invites Get

get.description: Return the expected CSV template for bulk invite.

Return an Open Badges 3.0 Verifiable Credential for a volunteer's AURA badge.

The credential is publicly accessible — no auth required.
Rate limited (RATE_DISCOVERY) to prevent volunteer enumeration.

schema.title: Response Get Open Badge Credential Api Badges  Volunteer Id  Credential Get

get.description: Open Badges issuer profile.

schema.title: Response Get Issuer Profile Api Badges Issuer Get

get.description:
Validate token and return volunteer + competency info for the rating UI.

Public endpoint — no auth header required.
Attacker note: only non-sensitive volunteer info is returned (display_name, username, avatar).
The token is single-use and time-limited — no brute-force risk beyond rate limiting.

post.description:
Submit a rating for a volunteer and mark the token as used.

This is atomic: we update token_used=TRUE in the same row as the rating.
If two concurrent requests hit this endpoint with the same token, the second
will get TOKEN_ALREADY_USED from _get_valid_token_row.
Note: There is a small TOCTOU window — mitigated by the UNIQUE constraint on
token + a DB-level check trigger if needed in production.

get.description:
Get activity feed for the current user.

Aggregates from assessment_sessions, badges, behavior_signals,
and event_registrations into a unified timeline.

schema.title: Response Get My Activity Api Activity Me Get

get.description:
Get dashboard stats for the current user.

Returns: events_attended, total_hours (estimated), verified_skills, streak_days.

schema.title: Response Get My Stats Api Activity Stats Me Get

get.description:
Search public volunteer profiles by competency, score, role, and badge.

Returns cursor-paginated results. Use `next_after_score` + `next_after_id`
from meta to get the next page.

**Contact volunteers:** Use the returned `volunteer_id` with
`POST /api/organizations/{org_id}/assign-assessments`.

Get top volunteers ranked by AURA score.

Public endpoint — no auth required.
Volunteers ranked > 10 have their display_name anonymized to protect privacy.

Return current user's all-time leaderboard rank.

Used by dashboard StatsRow to show competitive position without
calling the full leaderboard (which is public + limited to top 50).
Unread notification count — used for sidebar badge.
List user notifications, newest first.

patch.description: Mark all unread notifications as read.
Mark a single notification as read. Returns updated notification.

get.description:
Get platform-wide public statistics.

Returns volunteer count, completed assessments, active events, and average AURA score.
All counts use exact=True for accurate results. Designed to remain fast on free-tier.

Beta funnel health metrics — for the failure protocol.

SEC-Q3: Restricted to organization accounts only. Volunteers have no use for
this data, and exposing completion/abandonment rates to all users leaks operational
intelligence (platform health, abuse detection timing, user count signals).

Abandonment proxy: sessions with status='in_progress' AND updated_at < 24h ago.
This is not perfect (some users may still be in progress) but is a good signal.

post.description: Receive Telegram update via webhook. Uses Depends for admin client (OWASP HIGH-01 fix).

Register the webhook URL with Telegram API. Call once after deploy.

CRIT-03 FIX: Requires secret header to prevent unauthorized webhook re-registration.
Call with: curl -X POST .../api/telegram/setup-webhook -H "X-Admin-Secret: <TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET>"

Store a character event from any product.

user_id is always sourced from the JWT — never from the request body.
Crystal events validate balance and idempotency BEFORE inserting.

get.description:
Return the authenticated user's event history (paginated, newest first).

Hard cap: 200 rows per request.

schema.title: Response List Character Events Api Character Events Get

get.description:
Compute and return current character state for the authenticated user.

Aggregates events + crystal ledger into a single snapshot via DB function.
Returns empty state for new users with no events.

Return crystal balance for the authenticated user.

Lightweight alternative to GET /state — used by MindShift to show the
crystal counter in the focus session overlay without the cost of the full
5-query get_character_state RPC.

Implementation: single SUM over game_crystal_ledger (indexed on user_id).
Get the current user's AI Twin (or null if none).

schema.title: Response Get My Twin Api Brandedby Twins Get

post.description: Create the user's AI Twin. One per user (MVP).

patch.description: Update the user's AI Twin. Only owner can update.

post.description:
Regenerate AI Twin personality from current character_state.

Reads verified skills, AURA scores, XP from character_events → generates
a personality prompt via Gemini → stores in ai_twins.personality_prompt.

This is BrandedBy's core moat: verified data → intelligent persona.

Activate the AI Twin (draft → active). Requires a photo and personality_prompt.

Once active, the twin can accept generation requests.

Request a new video/audio/chat generation.

If skip_queue=true, spends crystals via character_events ledger.

get.description: List the current user's generation jobs (newest first).

schema.title: Response List Generations Api Brandedby Generations Get

get.description: Get a single generation job by ID.
List all available product skills.

post.description:
Execute a product skill with user's context.

Loads the skill markdown, injects user data (profile, AURA, competencies),
calls LLM, returns structured output.

get.description:
Return current subscription status for the authenticated user.

Auto-expires trials whose trial_ends_at has passed — writes the update
to the database so subsequent reads are consistent without a cron job.

post.description:
Create a Stripe Checkout Session for the monthly subscription.

Flow:
1. Read profile (email + existing stripe_customer_id)
2. Create Stripe Customer if not already linked
3. Persist new stripe_customer_id immediately (before checkout — avoids orphans)
4. Create Checkout Session with customer pre-filled
5. Return {checkout_url}

Handle Stripe webhook events.

Security: validates Stripe-Signature header using stripe_webhook_secret.
Rejects any request that fails signature verification with 400.

Handled events:
- customer.subscription.created  → status = active
- customer.subscription.updated  → status = active | cancelled depending on Stripe status
- customer.subscription.deleted  → status = cancelled

AITwinOut.title: AITwinOut
AITwinOut.description: Response model for an AI Twin.

AnswerFeedback.title: AnswerFeedback
AnswerFeedback.description:
Immediate feedback after submitting an answer.

NOTE: raw_score intentionally NOT exposed to client (security audit CRIT-03).
Exposing BARS scores enables calibration attacks — users can reverse-engineer
what answer patterns score highest by submitting variations.

AssessmentInfoOut.title: AssessmentInfoOut
AssessmentInfoOut.description: Pre-assessment info shown before starting a competency assessment.

AssessmentResultOut.title: AssessmentResultOut
AssessmentResultOut.description:
Full results after session completion.

NOTE: theta/theta_se intentionally NOT exposed to client (security audit P1).
Exposing IRT ability estimates enables reverse-engineering the CAT algorithm.

AssignAssessmentRequest.title: AssignAssessmentRequest
AssignAssessmentRequest.description: Assign one or more competency assessments to specific volunteers.

AuraCompetencyExplanation.title: AuraCompetencyExplanation
AuraCompetencyExplanation.description: Aggregated evaluation data for one competency session.

AuraEvaluationItem.title: AuraEvaluationItem
AuraEvaluationItem.description: Per-question evaluation log entry from a completed assessment session.

AuraExplanationResponse.title: AuraExplanationResponse
AuraExplanationResponse.description: Response for GET /aura/me/explanation — transparent per-competency breakdown.

BulkInviteResponse.title: BulkInviteResponse
BulkInviteResponse.description: Aggregate response for the bulk invite endpoint.

CharacterEventOut.title: CharacterEventOut
CharacterEventOut.description: Response for a stored character event.

crystal_balance.title: Crystal Balance
crystal_balance.description: Current crystal balance (floored at 0 — prevented from going negative at write time)

xp_total.title: Xp Total
xp_total.description: Lifetime XP earned across all products

verified_skills.title: Verified Skills
verified_skills.description: Volaura competency slugs verified by assessment, with score and badge tier

character_stats.title: Character Stats
character_stats.description: Life Simulator character stats — latest value per stat key (e.g. strength, intelligence)

CharacterStateOut.title: CharacterStateOut
CharacterStateOut.description:
Computed character state — derived from all events + crystal ledger.

This is the 'thalamus' view: one read shows the full cross-product state.
All four products read from this — Volaura, MindShift, Life Simulator, BrandedBy.

CreateVerificationLinkResponse.title: CreateVerificationLinkResponse
CreateVerificationLinkResponse.description: Returned when a verification link is created.

CrystalBalanceOut.title: CrystalBalanceOut
CrystalBalanceOut.description:
Lightweight crystal balance — for MindShift quick-check without full state RPC.

Cheaper than GET /character/state: 1 SQL aggregate vs 5 serial queries.
MindShift reads this to show the crystal counter in the focus session overlay.

DiscoverableVolunteer.title: DiscoverableVolunteer
DiscoverableVolunteer.description:
Volunteer profile visible to org users on the discovery page.

Only includes volunteers who have opted in (visible_to_orgs=True).
AURA score joined from aura_scores table.

DiscoveryResponse.title: DiscoveryResponse
DiscoveryResponse.description: Wrapped discovery response following {data, meta} envelope.

DiscoveryVolunteer.title: DiscoveryVolunteer
DiscoveryVolunteer.description:
Single volunteer in discovery results.

Security (agent review 2026-03-25):
- display_name: server-side anonymized to "First L." — never trust user-controlled field
- competency_score: only the REQUESTED competency — not full competency_scores JSONB
- volunteer_id: exposed intentionally — used by POST /organizations/{id}/assign-assessments

EventAttendeeRow.title: EventAttendeeRow
EventAttendeeRow.description: Enriched attendee for org dashboard — joins profile + AURA.

skip_queue.title: Skip Queue
skip_queue.description: If true, spend crystals to skip the queue

GenerationOut.title: GenerationOut
GenerationOut.description: Response model for a generation job.

InviteRowResult.title: InviteRowResult
InviteRowResult.description: Result for a single row in the bulk invite response.

OrgDashboardStats.title: OrgDashboardStats
OrgDashboardStats.description: Aggregate stats for the org management dashboard.

OrgVolunteerRow.title: OrgVolunteerRow
OrgVolunteerRow.description: One volunteer row in the org dashboard table.

OrganizationResponse.title: OrganizationResponse
OrganizationResponse.description: Public organization response — owner_id intentionally excluded to prevent UUID enumeration.

PublicProfileResponse.title: PublicProfileResponse
PublicProfileResponse.description: Minimal public profile for sharing — no sensitive fields.

QuestionBreakdownOut.title: QuestionBreakdownOut
QuestionBreakdownOut.description: Full per-question breakdown for a completed session.

QuestionOut.title: QuestionOut
QuestionOut.description: A single question as served to the frontend.

QuestionResultOut.title: QuestionResultOut
QuestionResultOut.description:
Per-question result shown after session completion.

NOTE: IRT parameters (irt_a/b/c) and raw_score intentionally NOT exposed.
difficulty_label is a mapped human-readable label from irt_b thresholds.
is_correct is derived from raw_score > 0 (binary, no numeric leak).

SavedSearchFilters.title: SavedSearchFilters
SavedSearchFilters.description:
Mirrors VolunteerSearchRequest — the JSONB payload stored in org_saved_searches.filters.

Keeping this as a dedicated model (not reusing VolunteerSearchRequest) prevents drift:
saved filters never include pagination (limit/offset) and must be stable across versions.

SavedSearchOut.title: SavedSearchOut
SavedSearchOut.description: Response for a saved search row.

SessionOut.title: SessionOut
SessionOut.description:
Lightweight session state returned after start/answer.

NOTE: theta and theta_se are intentionally NOT exposed to the client.
Exposing IRT ability estimates enables reverse-engineering the CAT algorithm
and predicting upcoming questions. (Security audit P1, 2026-03-24)

SharingPermissionRequest.title: SharingPermissionRequest
SharingPermissionRequest.description: Grant/revoke sharing permission to an organization.

UpdateVisibilityRequest.title: UpdateVisibilityRequest
UpdateVisibilityRequest.description: Allow user to change their score visibility.

VerificationTokenInfo.title: VerificationTokenInfo
VerificationTokenInfo.description: Returned by GET /api/verify/{token} — public, no auth required.

VerifiedSkillOut.title: VerifiedSkillOut
VerifiedSkillOut.description: A single verified skill entry in the character state.

WebhookAck.title: WebhookAck
WebhookAck.description: Stripe webhook handler always returns this on success.
